completed_work: Added tests for context summary dry-run output in both provider CLIs.
Added tests requiring --print-context-summary to be paired with --print-prompt.
Verified with full pytest suite: 206 passed.
key_decisions: Expose latest-context policy summary in prompt dry-run flows only through an explicit flag.
Preserve existing --print-prompt behavior unless --print-context-summary is supplied.
Require --print-context-summary to be used with both --latest-context and --print-prompt.
next_actions: Run an AI-Lab provider comparison to decide the next smallest implementation target now that the warning-cap/context-policy ergonomics chain is closed.
risks: Dry-run output now has an optional preamble mode; scripts that parse --print-prompt output should avoid --print-context-summary unless they expect the summary header.
summary_text: AI-Lab added optional latest-context summary output to provider prompt dry runs. scripts/ask_provider.py and scripts/compare_providers.py now support --print-context-summary when --latest-context and --print-prompt are both enabled. The summary prints the resolved latest-context policy before the final prompt, including resolved max_warning_admissions and its source, while preserving default prompt-only dry-run behavior unless the summary flag is explicitly used. Tests cover both provider CLIs and require --print-context-summary to be paired with --print-prompt. Full test suite passed with 206 tests.
